title: [acheli] Archer's Helicopter
description: This is a flight simulation mod that pursuits realism.
body:
![Above the canyon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c58b165f26a57cd4be8c207f6d9649a1804d7e_0.webp)
##### _We are not professional aerodynamic experts, but we strive to provide an excellent aircraft mod to everyone. It is the support of players like you that gives us the motivation to keep going!_

#
### Hello there!
Would you like to experience the thrilling adventure of mountain traversal?
![snow mountain flight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4609ed267819b6fbbf87dd6cb261cfe7dba45b8f_0.webp)
![Watching the snow capped mountains from the cabin door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60dba66f066f722bf4e86d6b341772ed59670840_0.webp)


 You mentioned encountering a formidable foe? No worries, rally your comrades and conduct an airstrike on your enemies. Oh, and just in case, you can make a quick escape in a pinch. 

![escape from monster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84bae7c120b7e7d30c7d6adac10186a6ba4464a_0.webp)

 Or perhaps you’d prefer a serene and elegant flight all by yourself… Either way, you can now pilot a realistic flying vehicle and explore your own way of playing!
 
![Above the canyon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49441900f5d7e7785db4e3efd1097e8f58bda702_0.webp)

#### _Additional functionalities are in the works. Your patience is greatly appreciated._


# 📑Guide
### Requirements mod
#### _fabric_
1. fabric-api-0.92.2 at least
2. cloth-config-11.1.136-fabric at least
#
### Gaming help
  First, open the game’s inventory, and select the spawn-egg with the symbol that looks like a test dummy and click right-button of your mouse put it on ground.
  
![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53a962018275a9a364eda5d694ce55a9b21639fb_0.webp)

 Then, aim the crosshair at the seat entity and right-click with the mouse to sit down.
 
![schematic diagram of seat entity location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec602de221b8d9cd4d0077fd36cdbad800c0178f_0.webp)

  While you are in the driving seat, hold down the right ALT key on the keyboard and wait for the engine RPM to reach 6000 RPM, then you can take off.
![driving perspective](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c6a0c768ac4fb150a7fab53a238898a285d959_0.webp)


### keybinding description:
#### _keyboard controls:_

- J: Push the helicopter’s cyclic pitch lever forward.(aircraft attitude)
- N: Pull the helicopter’s cyclic pitch lever backward.(aircraft attitude)
- B: Push the helicopter’s cyclic roll lever to left. (aircraft attitude)
- M: Push the helicopter’s cyclic roll lever to right.(aircraft attitude)

- Right-Alt: engine switch (long press to open/shutdown)

- Up: Pull up the collective pitch lever (about 60% percent to take off)
- Down: Push down the collective pitch lever 
- Left: Aircraft left rudder
- Right: Aircraft right rudder
- O: Open the setting screen
#
#### _Joypad controls:_

- A button: Engine on/off switch (long press to open/shutdown)

- Left joystick: Control collective pitch lever magnitude (about 60% percent to take off)
- Right joystick: Control cyclic pitch lever position (aircraft attitude)
- Left trigger: Aircraft left rudder
- Right trigger: Aircraft right rudder

## Wiki
  
  Since we currently have not developed the item crafting table for survival mode, and are still in the process of planning the game's item content, there are no item tutorials available at the moment.
  But you can always keep an eye on our [website](https://github.com/Liruochen1207/Archer-s-Helicopter/wiki) for updates.


# 🐞How to Report Issues
The mod will not consider open-sourcing at this time, but we have set up a GitHub repository for bug reporting. Additionally, we welcome any suggestions for improvement; if you have better ideas or valuable feedback, please feel free to share them with us. [Thanks for your help!](https://github.com/Liruochen1207/Archer-s-Helicopter/issues)
 


# 🚩Suggestions
![Simulate cabin door machine gun with Timeless and Classics Zero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2118887de513734fc37e9e7896eedd12132d0e83.gif)
- You can play with the [Timeless and Classics Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) to experience rapid strikes on enemies from high ground.
- You can play with the [Leawind's Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawind-third-person) for an even more immersive third-person flying experience.
- You can pair it with the [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) to experience high-altitude flight with an ultra-long field of vision.
- You can pair it with a large scenery mod (for example: [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith),[Epic Terrain](https://modrinth.com/datapack/epicterrain)) to experience stunning terrain and accelerate the pace of exploration.
- You can pair it with the [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) mod to enjoy a more comfortable frame rate experience.
- Construct a helipad for your house or build a runway nearby.
- Equip your underground launch base with a mechanical mod (for instance: [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)) that includes a lift function for the helipad and an openable outdoor hatch cover.
- Unleash your creativity and imagination 💡

#
#### _The project is currently under continuous development..._
